label: 1861 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 99–367, § 2(b)100 Stat. 774July 31, 1986
notes: Section, , , , required Secretary of the Interior, within six months of , and in his annual report thereafter, to report to Comptroller General on shut-in and flaring oil and gas wells and required Comptroller General, within six months after receipt of report, to review and evaluate methodology used by Secretary in allowing wells to be shut-in or flare natural gas and submit his findings and recommendations to Congress.Pub.
